title: [codereview-pass2] forward_mesh_to_upstream drops local-mesh packets instead of mesh_to_mesh path
description: lichend.rs:354-356: if gw.is_local_mesh(&dst) { return; } — packet silently dropped instead of forwarding downward via RPL. Violates spec/05-routing.md:7.2 'if is_local_mesh(dst)' use RPL source routing. No mesh_to_mesh implemented (see epic). P0. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3k6w
close_reason: Fixed forward_mesh_to_upstream to branch on is_local_mesh+dst extraction and call mesh_to_mesh path (instead of TUN/drop) for local-mesh packets. Added RplNode::lookup_route delegation, mesh_to_mesh stub (with SRH TODO), updated is_local_mesh docs. cargo check+test passed cleanly. Completed mandatory 3 codereview passes (9+ beads filed as codereview: trmo/f05s/d7x3/9bp4/6euj/c5b4/tmnr + priors from u9in/cag9). Remaining P1/P2 filed as follow-ups under epic.
